title: BEM-641 post-hook check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return None
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}
items=[]
if queue.exists():
    for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json')):
        item=load(str(p))
        if isinstance(item,dict): item['path']=str(p)
        items.append(item)
runner=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.json')
dispatched=[x for x in items if isinstance(x,dict) and x.get('status')=='dispatched']
failed=[x for x in items if isinstance(x,dict) and x.get('status')=='dispatch_failed']
queued=[x for x in items if isinstance(x,dict) and x.get('status')=='queued']
status='all_dispatched' if dispatched and not queued and not failed else ('dispatch_failed' if failed else ('still_queued' if queued else 'no_queue_items'))
blocker=None if status=='all_dispatched' else {'code':'DISPATCH_QUEUE_POST_HOOK_NOT_COMPLETE','status':status,'queued_count':len(queued),'failed_count':len(failed),'runner':runner}
result={'schema_version':'dispatch_queue_post_hook_check.v1','bem':'BEM-641','status':status,'items':items,'runner':runner,'dispatched_count':len(dispatched),'queued_count':len(queued),'failed_count':len(failed),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:53 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem641_dispatch_queue_post_hook_check.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem641_dispatch_queue_post_hook_check.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-641 | Dispatch Queue Post-Hook Check | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:53 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Dispatched'+sep+str(len(dispatched))+sep+sep+'## Queued'+sep+str(len(queued))+sep+sep+'## Failed'+sep+str(len(failed))+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem641_dispatch_queue_post_hook_check','cycle_id':'bem641-dispatch-queue-post-hook-check','source':'gpt_monitor','status':status,'dispatched_count':len(dispatched),'queued_count':len(queued),'failed_count':len(failed),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:53 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem641_dispatch_queue_post_hook_check']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'dispatched_count':len(dispatched),'queued_count':len(queued),'failed_count':len(failed),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue_post_hook']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:53 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem641_dispatch_queue_post_hook_check.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-641: status='+status+' dispatched='+str(len(dispatched))+' queued='+str(len(queued))+' failed='+str(len(failed))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked dispatch queue state after codex-runner post-hook should have processed queued workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
